title: Slate documentation manifest
description: Contract between Content and Shell. Accepts a v1 array of entries or a v2 object with version, optional config, and entries.

path.description: Relative path to a .md or .html content file, or an absolute URL when type is 'external'.

title.description: Nav and tab title. Derived from the first H1 when omitted.

order.description: Ascending sort within the entry's group or folder.

group.description: Explicit nav section label; overrides folder-derived grouping.

icon.description: Material Symbol name (e.g. 'home', 'flag') rendered via the Material Symbols font; overrides the default nav file icon.

hidden.description: Omit from nav but keep searchable and deep-linkable.
